PRVDR_CITY 

LABEL: Provider City 

DESCRIPTION: Provider city name. The provider city when the address type represents the provider’s billing, practice 
or service location. 

SHORT NAME: PRVDR_CITY 

LONG NAME: PRVDR_CITY 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 42 

FILE(S): APR Location 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: Text description (BALTIMORE, DALLAS) 

COMMENT: —
